output.dependency: The facility identifier appears to determine the facility profile fields: the same identifier is associated with the same hospital name, street address, city, state abbreviation, ZIP code, county, phone number, hospital category, ownership type, and yes/no facility flag.
The location fields are semantically linked: city and state are associated with a specific ZIP code and county. In the sample, Birmingham, AL corresponds to ZIP 35233 and county Jefferson.

The clinical condition/category is linked to the measure code and the full textual measure description, and the composite key is syntactically built from state + '_' + measure code. In the sample, the condition 'pneumonia' is associated with codes such as 'pn-3b' and 'pn-4', each mapping to a specific description, while 'al_pn-3b' and 'al_pn-4' embed the state abbreviation and measure code.
The measure code appears to determine the detailed measure description. Each short code corresponds to a specific full-text statement describing the hospital quality measure.
The composite identifier in the last column is syntactically dependent on the state abbreviation and the measure code: it follows the pattern '<state>_<measure code>'.
